offer: For property managers processing 10–20 rental properties/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate rent reconciliation reports instead of manual spreadsheets and accounting software.
problem: Manual reconciliation of rent payments leads to errors and delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Share in community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try error-checking and dashboard for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Make a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
